2242950.name: Heroes of Rome 3 - The Brotherhood
2242950.description:
The mysterious "Brotherhood of the Snake" has opened a passage to the Realm of Chaos. As a result, monsters flood the Roman Empire. Find all the key pieces in the world of the gods and close the portal to protect Rome! A world full of surprises and challenges await you and your Romans. Experience countless adventures in this fun click management game!

Features:

- Exciting click-management game
- The third adventure in daring lands
- Challenging and tricky levels
- No time limit mode for a relaxed gaming experience
- Earn awards and trophies
- Hours of entertaining gameplay
2242950.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
